query: أخبرني عن لحم تاجيما في محافظة هيوغو، أصل لحم كوبي.
reasoning: RULE D applied: query is in Arabic (ar) but response body text is rendered in Japanese — lang:'ar' was passed but descriptions/excerpts are not translated. RULE B applied: language mismatch is the single worst shortfall, scored as constraint_handling -1; specificity and practical_usefulness drop by at most 1 each. Featured heritage stories shown (丹波篠山/淡路/北前船/六古窯/関門) are food-culture adjacent but none directly address Tajima cattle, reducing intent and specificity to 3.
missing_data: Arabic-language description of 但馬牛 (Tajima cattle) as the genetic source of Kobe/Matsusaka/Yonezawa beef; GI registration details for 但馬牛; prominence/featured ranking of 但馬牛 among 195 results rather than heritage stories unrelated to beef.
improvement_hint: Ensure lang:'ar' triggers Arabic translations for description fields in get_local_food results, not just the metadata lang field.
